_about: Wild-encounter roster reference data - generated 2026-07-06 from the pinned
Tuxemon clone (commit c34a9c72) + CONTENT_REFERENCE.md section 16. NOT loaded by the
game. ourTypeProposed uses section 16's remap table, which is still [TO CONFIRM]
with Lewis. descriptions are Tuxemon project text (CC, credit Tuxemon).
Player-facing names come from Lewis's rename pass, area by area - slugs are
attribution blocks synced from sheet-manifest.json after the 2026-07-06 wiki-credit run; status 'flagged' = vendored but license terms still need confirming (the OPMon-derived trio).

areaProposed (added 2026-07-06) is a PROPOSED home area per monster - a draft for Lewis to react to (homework B37, worksheet: VENTA_ROSTER_DRAFT.md). Lines stay together: every stage of an evolution line shares one area.
